# host_file (Resource)

Manages whole host files or named Terraform-owned sections inside host files.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_file" "zshrc" {
  path = "~/.zshrc"

  content = trimspace(<<-EOT
    export EDITOR=nvim
    eval "$(starship init zsh)"
  EOT
  )
}

resource "host_file" "zshrc_sections" {
  path   = "~/.zshrc"
  render = "clean"

  block = {
    options = {
      priority = 10
      content = trimspace(<<-EOT
        setopt autocd
        bindkey -v
      EOT
      )
    }
    alias = {
      priority = 20
    }
    functions = {
      priority = 30
    }
  }
}
```

`render = "markers"` is the default and preserves unmanaged file content by writing generated marker comments into the host file. `render = "clean"` renders the host file without markers and stores block tracking metadata under `~/.terraform-provider-host/host_files`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Path to the host file. `~` is expanded to the current user's home directory when the provider reads or writes the file.

### Optional

- `block` (Attributes Map) Named file sections. Use map keys as section names so they can be referenced with `block["name"]`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--block))
- `content` (String) Full file content to manage without Terraform section markers. Mutually exclusive with `block`.
- `render` (String) How block mode is rendered. `markers` writes Terraform marker comments into the file. `clean` renders a marker-free file and stores block tracking metadata under `~/.terraform-provider-host`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `path`.

<a id="nestedatt--block"></a>
### Nested Schema for `block`

Optional:

- `content` (String) Content managed directly by the host file section. `host_file_block` resources targeting this section are rendered after this content.
- `priority` (Number) Sort priority for this section. Sections are ordered by `priority`, then section name.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) File section name.
- `path` (String) Path to the host file that contains this section.
- `render` (String) Render mode inherited from the containing host file.
